title: The Atonement of Jesus Christ
description: President Henry B. Eyring and Elder Jeffrey R. Holland teach that the Atonement of Jesus Christ is the central act of God's plan of salvation and the motivating force behind sharing the gospel with others.

title: The Mediator
source: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
description: Boyd K. Packer explains how Jesus Christ acts as our Mediator, satisfying both justice and mercy through His Atonement.

title: Because of Him
source: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
description: An inspiring Easter message centered on Jesus Christ, His Resurrection, and His redeeming power.

title: The Living Christ
source: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
description: A testimony of Jesus Christ as the Living Son of God, Redeemer, Savior, and King.

title: Welcome to the House of the Lord
description: An introduction to temples and their sacred purpose as the House of the Lord.

title: What Happens in a Temple?
description: Explains temple ordinances, covenants, and worship in a respectful and accessible way.

title: Focus on the Temple
description: President Russell M. Nelson teaches about temple blessings and covenant discipleship.

title: The Temple and Your Spiritual Foundation
description: President Nelson explains how temple covenants strengthen spiritual foundations.

title: Turning Hearts
source: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
description: A message about Elijah's mission and the importance of family history work.

title: Discover Your Family History, Discover Your Story
source: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
description: Learn how FamilySearch and family history research help connect generations.

title: The Blessings of the Temple
source: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
description: Temple ordinances and covenants bless individuals and families eternally.

title: Families Can Be Together Forever
source: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
description: A message explaining the doctrine of eternal families through temple covenants.

title: The First Vision
description: Joseph Smith's First Vision and the beginning of the Restoration of the Gospel of Jesus Christ.
